import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; const initialForm = { patient: '', phone: '+55', clinic: '', type: 'confirmacao', scheduledAt: '', note: '' }; const typeLabels = { confirmacao: 'Confirmação', agendamento: 'Agendamento', reagendamento: 'Reagendamento' }; function PatientManagement() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [form, setForm] = useState(initialForm); const [records, setRecords] = useState([]); const grouped = useMemo(() => records.reduce((acc, record) => { acc[record.type] = (acc[record.type] || 0) + 1; return acc; }, {}), [records]); const updateForm = (field, value) => { setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: value })); }; const saveRecord = (event) => { event.preventDefault(); setRecords((prev) => [{ ...form, id: Date.now(), createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }, ...prev]); setForm(initialForm); }; return (

Confirmação, agendamento e reagendamento

Registre contatos e movimentos do paciente com histórico operacional.
